name: ddl-type-mapper
description: Implement JSON Schema type to SQL type mapping with dialect-aware translation
acceptanceCriteria: mapPropertyType(prop: any, dialect: SqlDialect) function exported
Maps type: 'string' with no format to TEXT
Maps type: 'string' with format: 'uuid' using dialect.mapType()
Maps type: 'string' with format: 'date-time' using dialect.mapType()
Maps type: 'number' to DOUBLE PRECISION (pg) or REAL (sqlite)
Maps type: 'array' of primitives to JSONB (pg) or TEXT (sqlite) per req-ddl-jsonb-arrays
Handles enum with checkConstraint flag per req-ddl-enum-checks
